/usr/bin/avr-gcc -mmcu=atmega4808 -DF_CPU=20000000UL -Os -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -mmcu=atmega4808 -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--relax -Wl,--section-start=.appvectors=0x1000 -Wl,--undefined=__app_trampoline_vectors CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/app_trampoline.S.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/boot_eeprom.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/slots.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/nvm_flash.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/mcu.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/status_led.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/twi0.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/spi.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/drivers/w25q.c.obj CMakeFiles/dasboot.dir/src/drivers/atecc608a_bl.c.obj -o dasboot
